What We Do

Education-First. Always.

We are a financial markets research and education platform. Everything we do is designed to build smarter, more disciplined traders through structured learning — not signals, not hype, not shortcuts.

📊

Market Research & Analysis

Institutional-grade scenario analysis on ES Mini S&P 500, GC Gold, CL Oil, and major Forex pairs — shared for learning so you understand the reasoning, not just the conclusion.

🎓

Structured Trading Courses

Beginner, Intermediate and Advanced pathways covering market microstructure, risk frameworks, order flow, trading psychology and quantitative thinking.

🧠

Analyst Perspectives

Educational commentary with full context — explaining logic, risk considerations, and decision-making processes using Price, Volume, Time, Sentiment & Macro frameworks.

📝

Daily Trade Journalling

Learn how professionals document and review their decisions. We model daily journalling and decision-making processes that build long-term consistency.

🤝

Community & Mentorship

An active professional community supported by live weekly sessions, Q&A, and direct access to lead mentors for structured guidance across all levels.

⚖️

Risk Management Education

We teach risk-adjusted thinking using the Sortino Ratio framework — because protecting downside is the foundation of sustainable trading performance.

Simple Process

How It Works

From your first login to thinking like an institutional trader — three clear steps to structured development.

1

Choose Your Path

Start free in the Sortino Quants Community, join SQ Elite directly at £90/month, or unlock complimentary access via a CPA or IB partner broker. Every path begins with clarity — no pressure, no lock-in.

2

Learn & Analyse

Access institutional-grade trade scenario analysis on ES, Gold, Oil & Forex, structured education courses, weekly live sessions, and an active professional community — all built on quantitative, risk-adjusted thinking.

3

Grow as a Trader

Deepen your edge with personalised 1-to-1 mentorship across Beginner, Intermediate and Advanced pathways. Apply disciplined frameworks, review your decisions, and build the psychological consistency that separates sustainable traders from the rest.

Partner Benefits

CPA & Introducing Broker Access

When you open a trading account through our disclosed partner links, you receive genuine SQ Elite educational benefits — fully transparent, no hidden conditions. All relationships are openly disclosed as part of our revenue model.

🔗

CPA Affiliate Clients

Accounts opened via our StarTrader CPA partner link
What you receive
🎁 3 Months Free SQ Elite Membership

Open an account through our CPA (Cost Per Acquisition) affiliate link with StarTrader and complete verification via our Google Form to receive complimentary SQ Elite access for 3 months. That includes:

  • Full access to all 3 SQ Elite premium channels
  • Institutional trade scenario analysis on ES, Gold, Oil & Forex
  • Weekly live mentorship & Q&A sessions
  • Market microstructure & order flow education
  • SQ Elite community lounge access
  • 30% discount on any 1-to-1 mentorship session
Open CPA Account with StarTrader →
Disclosure: Sortino Quants Ltd receives a commission from StarTrader when an account is opened via this link. This is fully disclosed. Our educational content is independent of this commercial arrangement.
🤝

Introducing Broker (IB) Clients

Accounts transferred via our IB partner arrangement
What you receive
🎁 1 Month Free SQ Elite Membership

Transfer your trading account under our Introducing Broker partner account and complete verification via our Google Form to receive 1 month complimentary SQ Elite access. Our IB clients benefit from structured educational support — not pressure to trade more:

  • Full access to all 3 SQ Elite premium channels
  • Institutional trade scenario analysis on ES, Gold, Oil & Forex
  • Weekly live mentorship & Q&A sessions
  • Market microstructure & order flow education
  • SQ Elite community lounge access
  • 30% discount on any 1-to-1 mentorship session
Transfer Account via IB Link →
Disclosure: Sortino Quants Ltd may receive rebates or commissions via this IB arrangement. We do not encourage unnecessary trading, volume chasing, or overleveraging. Education and client welfare always come first.
Third-Party Platform Activities

Transparency on External Platforms

Third-Party Platform Disclosure

Sortino Quants Ltd team members may participate in third-party broker ecosystems, educational trading communities, or platform-based programmes. Any such activity is conducted through the respective platform's infrastructure and terms of service.

Where applicable, compensation may be received under those platform arrangements. Details of such arrangements will be disclosed where relevant to our community and clients.

Important: Sortino Quants' educational services remain entirely separate from any third-party platform activity. We do not present any platform-based activity as a core revenue stream or business offering. Our primary business is financial markets education.

The Team

Meet Our Analysts & Mentors

The Sortino Quants team combines quantitative rigor, institutional market experience, and financial technology expertise — bridging the gap between academic theory and real trading execution.

SA
Santhosh Asokan
Founder & Lead Trading Mentor
MSc Finance · Distinction University Topper FTMO Funded Bloomberg Certified CISI 2025

Santhosh began his financial markets journey in 2013, driven by a deep curiosity to study market microstructure. Over the past decade he has specialised in Index Futures and Options, combining quantitative risk models with intraday execution. His methodologies are grounded in probability, auction market theory, and volatility profiles. He holds an MSc in Global Financial Trading from London, graduating with Distinction and achieving University Topper status at postgraduate level.

Frequently Asked Questions

Common Questions

Do you provide financial advice or manage money?+
No. Sortino Quants Ltd is a financial markets education and research platform. We do not provide investment advice, portfolio management, or any regulated financial advisory services. All content — including analyst perspectives, scenario analysis, and market commentary — is provided solely for educational and informational purposes.
What is the difference between SQ Elite Membership and 1-to-1 sessions?+
SQ Elite Membership (£90/month) gives you access to all 3 premium channels: SQ Elite Education & Announcements, SQ Elite Trade Scenario Analysis, and the SQ Elite Lounge. The 1-to-1 sessions are private, structured mentorships tailored to your level — Beginner (4 sessions / £600), Intermediate (5 sessions / £750), or Advanced (3 sessions / £450). SQ Elite Members receive 30% off all 1-to-1 session rates.
How can I get free SQ Elite Membership access?+
There are three ways to receive complimentary access: (1) Open a trading account via our CPA StarTrader affiliate link and complete our Google Form verification — receive 3 months free. (2) Enrol in any 1-to-1 Mentorship Programme (Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced) — receive 3 months free. (3) Transfer your trading account via our IB partner link and complete verification — receive 1 month free.
Do I need a maths or finance background to join?+
Not at all. Our Beginner pathway starts from the foundations — market structure, risk thinking, platform setup — and builds systematically. A disciplined mindset and a genuine commitment to learning are the only requirements.
Are your affiliate and broker relationships disclosed?+
Yes — always. We maintain full transparency over all commercial relationships, including our CPA affiliate arrangement with StarTrader and our Introducing Broker (IB) partnership. These are documented in our Revenue Model & Transparency section. Our educational content is never influenced by these commercial arrangements.
What does a Discovery Call involve?+
A Discovery Call is a short, free conversation with one of our mentors before you book a 1-to-1 pathway. It helps us understand your current trading background, learning goals, and which pathway is the right fit. There is no obligation to purchase and no sales pressure — it is purely educational guidance.
Can I cancel my SQ Elite Membership at any time?+
Yes. SQ Elite Membership is a monthly rolling subscription with no long-term commitment. You can cancel at any time without penalty.
